title: England men's national ice hockey team
summary: The English national ice hockey team was the national ice hockey team of England. The club last participated in an international game in 1994, a 6–5 win against Scotland. While England still participates in junior hockey tournaments, in most IIHF tournaments, English players are part of the Great Britain national ice hockey team.
